column1: 遅れたけど、間に合っただけましだ。
column2: おくれたけど、まにあっただけましだ。
column3: I was running late, but at least I made it in time.
column4: だけましだ (at least ~ is better, should be grateful it's at least ~)
column5: Verb[plain] + だけましだ / i-Adj + だけましだ
column6: expresses that one should count one's blessings; the situation could be worse, so the present state is relatively better
column7: だけましだ: making it in time beats missing it
column8: だけましだ = could be worse, relatively better; せめて = at least (wish for minimum); まだましだ = still better than (comparison); よかった = glad that
